0.1.0.en: Initial release. Track Color Line bookings with departure/arrival times, ship name, cabin info, guest count, price, route, trip type, and return leg data. Includes flow triggers for hours threshold, price/ship/departure changes, and condition cards for hours comparison.

0.1.2.en: Color Line logo as app icon, ship embark icon as driver icon

0.1.5.en: Updated readme and texts to guideline specs

0.1.6.en: Fixed a bug where booking data would stop refreshing after the first sync. Added a "Refresh booking data" flow action for on-demand updates. Improved resilience against Color Line site updates.

0.1.7.en: Fixed a bug where booking data would stop refreshing after the first sync. Added a 'Refresh booking data' flow action for on-demand updates. Improved resilience against Color Line site updates.
